# AI Presale Workflow Instructions

This repository is a Markdown skill workspace for presale work. Do not build an app unless explicitly asked.

Start from `AGENTS.md`. Follow `.agent/rules.md`, `.agent/workflows/presale.md`, and the relevant `.agent/skills/*/SKILL.md`.

Default behavior:

- clarify input/output;
- generate questions with exactly 3 options and one recommendation;
- keep context compact;
- flag scope creep;
- keep proposal and WBS consistent;
- only finalize after finalization review.
